subject: A hooded figure bends over a fallen figure on the ground, surrounded by dark energy; a large translucent face in profile looms in the upper left as a ghostly presence
description: A wide, horizontally-composed scene built around two planes of reality. In the upper left, a massive translucent face rendered in cool grey-blue looks downward — a ghostly presence or memory. In the right half of the image, a small hooded figure in dark robes crouches over a prostrate figure on the ground, reaching toward them. A jagged white lightning bolt streaks diagonally in the right background. Purple and deep violet energy swirls through the dark atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by cold grey, purple, and black with flashes of white from the lightning. The flavor text references Etrata as the subject of the card — the hooded figure is plausibly Etrata, though the hood obscures all identifying features.
foreground: hooded figure crouching over fallen body, dark robes, reaching hand
background: translucent ghostly face profile, lightning bolt, swirling purple energy
emotion: cold determination, grief or obsession — the ghostly face watching, the living figure bent over the fallen
